title: apply-safe-defaults output
description: The result of auto-filling: merged ``resolved`` plus what stayed open.

resolved.description: The input `resolved` merged with every applied safe_default.
resolved.title: Resolved

applied.description: field → value for each ambiguity auto-filled from its safe_default.
applied.title: Applied

still_unresolved.description: Fields that could NOT be auto-filled — a REQUIRED_CALLER_FIELDS member (no safe_default by partition), or an ambiguity whose safe_default was absent. These remain for the caller; chiefly goal / task_generator.
still_unresolved.title: Still Unresolved

all_resolved.description: True iff still_unresolved is empty (the spec is ready to hand off).
all_resolved.title: All Resolved
